claims.claim: Ollama fallback risks semantic flattening under high entropy and distinguishability loss.
claims.rationale: The fallback request now carries the Gemma 4 voice contract exactly once; existing dynamic texture selector/budget logic remains in force for high-entropy fallback.

claims.claim: High-entropy, low-pressure fallback should preserve shimmering/lattice texture while respecting the sentence cap.
High density gradient plus pressure should preserve slope versus weighted-medium distinctions rather than generic heaviness.
